blue_oceans.notes: 4.1M community. Recipe apps are content libraries. No app gamifies the daily cooking micro-skill (one knife technique, one sauce reduction, one flavor pairing) with XP, skill trees, and streak level-up gates for aspiring home chefs.

3.8M community. Coffee apps are timers or scale companions. No app gamifies the daily coffee skill streak — one new brew method practiced, one extraction ratio dialed, one tasting note logged — with XP, technique badges, and a mastery progression path.

960K community. Sourdough apps are calculators and recipe boxes. No app gamifies the daily sourdough habit (feed starter, log hydration, practice shaping) with streak XP, fermentation mastery badges, and level-up challenges.

4.9M community. Meal apps plan and track calories. No app gamifies the daily meal prep habit (one batch cook session, one new efficient technique practiced, one macro goal hit) with streak XP, prep speed badges, and mastery level gates.

8.5M community. AllTrails has basic streak elements but no XP system or skill progression. SOFT COMPETITION — opportunity exists for a gamified hiking streak with skill trees (navigation, wilderness survival, trail identification) and XP level-up.

720K community. Climbing apps are logbooks or training plans. No app gamifies the daily climbing streak (one technique drill, one problem session logged, one strength micro-workout) with XP, grade progression tracking, and skill tree badges.

780K community. Apps do plant ID or log observations. No app gamifies daily foraging education (learn one edible species today, one toxic lookalike study, one seasonal calendar check) with streak XP, region-specific species badges, and forager level progression.

980K community. Apps find campsites or serve as static references. No app gamifies daily wilderness skill building (one fire-starting technique practiced, one shelter knot learned, one Leave No Trace principle applied) with streak XP and outdoorsman mastery progression.

3.65M community. 750 Words has basic streak tracking but no XP or skill progression. SOFT COMPETITION — clear gap for a gamified fiction writing streak with craft skill trees (dialogue, scene structure, character arc) and daily prompt challenges with XP.

2M community. Writing tools are reference or general journals. No app gamifies daily poetry practice (one form mastered — haiku, sonnet, villanelle; one imagery exercise; one line revision drill) with streak XP, form unlock progression, and poet level gates.

4.54M community. Tools organize lore but none gamify the daily worldbuilding habit (one geography detail added, one culture element built, one magic rule defined) with streak XP, lore depth badges, and worldbuilder mastery levels.

2.63M combined community. Screenwriting apps are professional formatting tools. No app gamifies the daily screenwriting habit (one scene written, one page of dialogue polished, one structure beat analyzed) with streak XP, format mastery badges, and craft level-up progression.

2.82M community. Mental health apps are clinical or conversational. No app gamifies the daily CBT micro-habit (one thought record completed, one cognitive distortion identified, one behavioral experiment logged) with streak XP and CBT skill level progression.

2.29M community. Daylio tracks mood without XP or gamified rewards. No app gamifies the daily mood tracking habit (log mood, identify trigger, one coping micro-action taken) with streak XP, mental wellness level-up, and achievement badges for consistency milestones.

3.62M community. Apps deliver content not active daily self-compassion habits. No app gamifies the daily self-compassion streak (one loving-kindness exercise, one inner critic reframe, one self-affirmation practice) with XP, inner healing level progression, and compassion mastery badges.
